quick_skim.title: OmniEEG-Bench: A Standardized Evaluation Benchmark for EEG Foundation Models
quick_skim.abstract: Electroencephalography (EEG) supports a variety of brain-computer interface (BCI) tasks ranging from brain-state monitoring to human-LLM interactions. EEG foundation models are emerging, but evaluation remains fragmented due to heterogeneous datasets and nconsistent task protocols. Here, we introduce OmniEEG-Bench, a unified benchmark and downstream task roadmap for EEG foundation models (FMs). It organizes evaluation of EEG FMs into six task families spanning (i) signal reliability, (ii) biometrics and disease, (iii) consciousness and state, (iv) cognition and emotion, (v) naturalistic stimulus decoding, and (vi) motor and interaction, introducing a new generation of tasks not systematically benchmarked in prior EEG FM work. OmniEEG-Bench standardizes model deployment, task definitions, and metrics through a task-card specification, and unifies 54 EEG datasets with consistent evaluation protocols. We benchmark 10 representative EEG foundation models and report a leaderboard that covers diverse evaluation settings. Both pretraining dataset diversity and model size are significantly associated with better average ranks across datasets, revealing scaling-law behavior in EEG foundation models (Figure 1). These results suggest that scaling EEG foundation models requires not only larger architectures but also broader and more diverse pretraining data. The benchmark code is available at https://github.com/ncclab-sustech/omni-eegbench.git.
quick_skim.llm_evidence_en: EEG benchmark including consciousness and state tasks relevant to sleep
quick_skim.llm_evidence_cn: 脑电基准包含与睡眠相关的意识状态任务
quick_skim.llm_evidence: 脑电基准包含与睡眠相关的意识状态任务
quick_skim.canonical_evidence: 脑电基准包含与睡眠相关的意识状态任务
quick_skim.llm_tldr_en: OmniEEG-Bench provides a unified benchmark for EEG foundation models across six task families, including consciousness and state, facilitating standardized evaluation in sleep neuroscience.
quick_skim.llm_tldr_cn: 脑电图基础模型评估因数据集和任务协议不一致而碎片化。本文提出OmniEEG-Bench，一个统一的评估基准，涵盖信号可靠性、意识与状态、认知与情感等六大任务族，其中意识与状态任务直接关联睡眠研究。该基准为睡眠神经科学领域的脑电模型评估提供了标准化平台，有助于比较不同模型在睡眠阶段分类等任务上的表现。
quick_skim.llm_tldr: 脑电图基础模型评估因数据集和任务协议不一致而碎片化。本文提出OmniEEG-Bench，一个统一的评估基准，涵盖信号可靠性、意识与状态、认知与情感等六大任务族，其中意识与状态任务直接关联睡眠研究。该基准为睡眠神经科学领域的脑电模型评估提供了标准化平台，有助于比较不同模型在睡眠阶段分类等任务上的表现。
quick_skim.matched_query_text: Papers central to 研究睡眠神经科学领域的学术文章, especially work that connects or combines: advancements in sleep neuroscience research; neurobiological mechanisms of sleep and wakefulness; neural regulation of the sleep-wake cycle; brain circuits involved in sleep control; neural mechanisms of rapid eye movement sleep; neurobiology of non-rapid eye movement sleep; recent advances in sleep neuroscience research; neural mechanisms underlying sleep wake regulation; neurobiological basis of clinical sleep disorders.
